trust_score.label: Customer Trust
trust_score.description: How much customers trust the system to be fair and responsive (0-100).

refund_rate.label: Refund Rate
refund_rate.description: Percentage of transactions that result in a refund request.

abuse_rate.label: Abuse Rate
abuse_rate.description: Percentage of refund requests that are fraudulent or abusive.

customer_satisfaction.label: Customer Satisfaction
customer_satisfaction.description: Overall customer satisfaction with the refund experience (0-100).

revenue_margin.label: Revenue Margin
revenue_margin.description: Net revenue margin after accounting for refund costs and operational overhead.

escalation_rate.label: Escalation Rate
escalation_rate.description: Percentage of refund cases that require human intervention.

auto_resolve_rate.label: Auto-Resolve Rate
auto_resolve_rate.description: Percentage of refunds handled entirely by AI without human review.

already_stressed.description: System already under pressure from high refund volume
